scripts.build: bun run build:dashboard && bun run build:server
scripts.test: bun test packages/core && cd packages/cli && bun test && cd ../dashboard && bunx vitest run
scripts.test:coverage: cd packages/core && bun run test:coverage && cd ../server && bun run test:coverage && cd ../cli && bun run test:coverage && cd ../dashboard && bun run test:coverage
